meaning: n.亚力酒(一种亚洲产烈酒,用椰子汁,糖蜜或枣酿制)
examples: Also popular are spirits such as arrack, made from coconut pulp and tree SAP.
After the bar, the four of us bought a gigantic bottle of, I can barely say it, arrack.
It is said of him that he could ferment an arrack out of the roughest of stones, and drink it to clear his head after a long day's figuring.
